title: Chromatic Flatland
description: Une esthétique vectorielle moderniste du milieu du siècle, caractérisée par des blocs de couleurs pures sans ombres et l'absence totale de contours. Les sujets sont réduits à leurs primitives géométriques les plus basiques avec des bords nets, créant une composition naïve et tranquille rappelant les illustrations de livres pour enfants vintage ou le design graphique suisse minimaliste.
description_en: A highly stylized, mid-century modern vector aesthetic characterized by pure, unshaded color blocks and the complete absence of outlines. Subjects are reduced to their most basic geometric primitives with razor-sharp edges, creating a naive, tranquil composition reminiscent of vintage children's book illustrations or minimalist Swiss graphic design.
description_fr: Une esthétique vectorielle moderniste du milieu du siècle, caractérisée par des blocs de couleurs pures sans ombres et l'absence totale de contours. Les sujets sont réduits à leurs primitives géométriques les plus basiques avec des bords nets, créant une composition naïve et tranquille rappelant les illustrations de livres pour enfants vintage ou le design graphique suisse minimaliste.
prompt: This is a meticulously crafted flat digital vector illustration, drawing profound inspiration from mid-century modern graphic design, minimalist Swiss posters, and vintage 1960s children's book illustrations. The visual execution demands that the {{subject}} is radically simplified, distilled down to its most elemental and rudimentary geometric primitives—perfect circles, sharp triangles, and crisp rectangles. The entire composition must be rendered using pure, unshaded solid color blocks. There are absolutely no outlines, no line work, and no contour strokes of any kind; forms and depths are defined exclusively by the stark contrast of adjacent, overlapping color planes. The color palette relies heavily on striking, opaque hues, featuring expansive fields of {{primary_color}} that dominate the structural layout, complemented by bold, strategically placed {{accent_color}} details, and supported by broad {{secondary_color}} foundation shapes. The lighting anatomy is entirely flat and non-directional—there are no highlights, no drop shadows, no ambient occlusion, and no gradients whatsoever, resulting in a matte, screen-printed serigraph aesthetic. Texturally, the image is immaculately clean and completely smooth, devoid of any film grain, noise, or brushstrokes. The spatial dynamics rely on a naive, 2D stacked perspective where depth is achieved merely by layering razor-sharp, vector-cut silhouettes over one another in a tranquil, static rhythm. The environment and the {{subject}} must seamlessly integrate into this ultra-flat geometric logic. CRITICAL: The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space with NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, and NO canvas edges; it must be a FULL BLEED composition to all four corners, where the geometric environment stretches entirely across the canvas. The edges of all shapes must remain perfectly crisp, mathematically precise, and unfeathered, finalizing a pristine, toy-like, graphic design masterpiece. flat vector, mid-century modern, geometric abstraction, unshaded, solid color blocks, no outlines, minimalist illustration, naive art, razor-sharp edges, serigraph style, screen print aesthetic, smooth digital, pure chroma, 2d composition, simple shapes, toy-like scale, graphic design, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame, no canvas, occupying entire space

background_prompt: An expansive, ultra-flat environment built entirely from overlapping, unshaded geometric planes, devoid of any specific subjects. The scene features sweeping diagonal color divisions and staggered, razor-sharp triangular and rectangular background masses that create a sense of naive 2D depth. Expansive fields of {{primary_color}} form the foundational ground, contrasting sharply with {{secondary_color}} distant abstract shapes, while sparse {{accent_color}} geometric accents punctuate the tranquil, static composition. Rendered in a pure digital vector style with absolutely no outlines, no gradients, and perfectly smooth, textureless color blocks.
background_prompt_removebg: An expansive, ultra-flat environment built entirely from overlapping, unshaded geometric planes, devoid of any specific subjects. The scene features sweeping diagonal color divisions and staggered, razor-sharp triangular and rectangular background masses that create a sense of naive 2D depth. Expansive fields of {{primary_color}} form the foundational ground, contrasting sharply with {{secondary_color}} distant abstract shapes, while sparse {{accent_color}} geometric accents punctuate the tranquil, static composition. Rendered in a pure digital vector style with absolutely no outlines, no gradients, and perfectly smooth, textureless color blocks. A decorative foreground frame consisting of flat, pure-color geometric vector cutouts sits in front of the invisible subject to create staggered, theatrical 2D depth. The entire scene and this geometric frame transition cleanly into a flat {{background_color}} surface, with the overlapping color blocks resting starkly against the {{background_color}} backdrop.
